game: High School DxD: Operation Paradise Infinity
notes: Consolidated from: annotations_batch1.zip (batches 1-19), hsdxd_annotations_batch_20_38.json (batches 20-38), annotations_highschooldxd_v1.zip (batches 39-59), session batch 60-78. Global seq renumber applied — original screenshot_id preserved in _original_id field. Sorted by screen_type > language > original seq. 12 near-duplicate pairs confirmed distinct (differ in unit_roster, ui_elements, or screen_notes). Seq #39 was missing from all source batches.

Unlike #2 and #9, this screen has both Back and OK buttons. Background shows partially visible chat/world log text.

annotations.game_name: High School DxD: Operation Paradise Infinity

Items shown with discount badges (-60%, -90%, -50%, -25%, -20%). Some slots show Qty today: X/X with 0 remaining (effectively sold out for today — is_enabled false). Item names partially cropped on left-side cards (only right portion visible). Character artwork (red-haired female) shown in top banner. Bottom tab bar shows Story Exc./Duel Ex./Ally Exc. as locked/greyed tabs.
